content.text:
[cron:15028631-f68e-464d-980d-b71e15ab1c1a version save] run a sync to GitHub to save version history of this OpenClaw and all other programs and files
Current time: Thursday, May 7th, 2026 - 7:59 PM (America/Chicago) / 2026-05-08 00:59 UTC

Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly with an explicit target. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.
I'll run a GitHub sync to save version history. Let me check the workspace state first.

arguments.command: cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace && git status --short && echo "---BRANCH---" && git branch -v && echo "---REMOTE---" && git remote -v

content.text: There's 1 commit ahead of GitHub. Let me also check for any unstaged changes and then push everything.

arguments.command: cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace && git add -A && git diff --cached --stat && git diff --stat

content.text: No uncommitted changes — just the 1 ahead commit needs pushing. Let me also check for other important directories that might need syncing.

arguments.command:
# Check OpenClaw config repo
cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw && git -C . rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree 2>/dev/null && git -C . status --short && git -C . log --oneline -1 && git -C . remote -v || echo "No git repo in .openclaw root"

content.text: OpenClaw config also has changes. Let me commit and push both repos.

arguments.command:
# Commit and push OpenClaw config
cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw && git add -A && git commit -m "sync: version save 2026-05-08_0059" && git push origin main 2>&1

# Push workspace repo (already committed, just needs push)
cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace && git push github main 2>&1
